extract: Ninjask (Japanese: テッカニン Tekkanin) is a dual-type Bug/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Nincada starting at level 20. This Evolution can trigger the creation of a second Pokémon, Shedinja, if the player has an empty slot in their party and an extra Poké Ball on hand. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
